_meta.name: app-regression
_meta.purpose: Claude classifies as app_regression — the element vanished or the page no longer renders the expected control. No machine_proposal because the test isn't wrong; the app is.
_meta.matches_on: prompt contains 'navigation failed' (from error_message in DiagnoseInput)

output.human_explanation: Navigation to /accounts/<id> redirected to /maintenance — the app routes failing accounts to a maintenance page during the current deploy window. Test selector logic is correct; the application contract changed.
evidence:
Pre-failure DOM excerpt shows

Maintenance in progress
Sibling scenarios with the same nav prefix all failed in this run — not isolated to one selector

alternatives_considered.rejected_because: The selector never had a chance to evaluate — the page is the maintenance page, not the accounts page
No 401/403 — server returned 200 with a different layout
